title: ESIC – Teaching Faculty – 118 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 118 Professors Posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 118 vacancies across India. Candidates with MS/MD Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 19-05-2026, and closes on 07-02-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through ESIC website, esic.gov.in.
basic_details.application_mode: Offline – via prescribed application form sent by Speed Post/file:2

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 03 August 2026 (for candidates from NE States, J&K Ladakh division, specified HP districts, Andaman & Nicobar, Lakshadweep etc.)

age_limit.age_details: Up to 5 years for ESIC / Government servants; 5 years for SC/ST; 3 years for OBC; 10 years for PwBD (with cumulative maximum as per rules); additional relaxations for Ex‑Servicemen as per Government orders.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree (Master’s) in concerned subject/allied discipline and a Doctorate degree (PhD) from a recognised University in the respective subject/allied discipline, as per MCI/NMC “Minimum Qualifications for Teachers in Medical Institutions Regulations”.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level‑13 in Pay Matrix (Rs. 1,23,100 – 2,15,900) plus Non‑Practicing Allowance (NPA) and other admissible allowances

selection_process: Interview by ESIC Selection Board; shortlisting based on experience if applications are large
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted offline only in the prescribed application form attached with the notification. No online application facility is available for this recruitment.
seo_tags: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026
